title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page is accessible for a device that is not currently connected during onboarding user guides
steps: Tap on a device that is NOT currently connected to the app
Observe the device details or settings page
Look for the Fit Test option or page
expected: The Fit Test page should NOT be accessible or should be grayed out/disabled for a device that is not actively connected to the app.
